title: Turnip's Animated Lanterns
description: Lanterns are better when they're animated.
body:
Breathe life into your builds with fully 3D, animated lanterns! This resource pack replaces the vanilla lantern model with a detailed 3D version featuring smooth flame animations. Perfect for fantasy builds, cozy cottages, or spooky dungeons.

🔹 Compatible with both lantern and soul lantern

🔹 No mods required – just drop it into your resource packs folder and enjoy!

You are free to use this in modpacks or other projects as long as proper credit is given. (CC-BY 4.0)
